summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. Fixed 2 critical bugs: (1) Missing @api_router.get decorator for /dm/{conversation_id}/messages endpoint, (2) DMCreate model had unnecessary 'content' field. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend verification confirms voice channel, DM calls, and status features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: @api_router.get('/dm/{conversation_id}/messages') decorator was orphaned at line 687 - function definition was at line 788 without decorator
FIXED: DMCreate model in models.py had 'content: str' field that was not used by the endpoint
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users and DM conversations during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 reported bugs appear to be fixed. WebSocket manager now supports multiple connections per user. Status updates broadcast member_status_update to server members. DM calls work (POST /api/dm/{id}/call, /answer, /decline, /end). Voice channel subscription works. Phone button visible in DM chat header.

verified_features.websocket_multi_connection: Backend verified - active_connections is Dict[str, List[WebSocket]]
verified_features.send_personal_resilient: Backend verified - removes only dead connections, doesn't nuke entire user
verified_features.status_broadcast: Backend verified - broadcasts member_status_update to server members
verified_features.dm_no_double_messages: Backend verified - send_personal used, no broadcast_dm duplication
verified_features.dm_call_start: Backend verified - POST /api/dm/{id}/call returns call data with status 'ringing'
verified_features.server_members_status: Backend verified - GET /api/servers/{id} returns members with is_online and status fields
verified_features.frontend_phone_button: Frontend verified - Phone icon button visible in DM chat header
verified_features.frontend_voice_channel: Frontend verified - Voice channel view with Join button works
verified_features.frontend_members_panel: Frontend verified - Shows ONLINE/OFFLINE sections with status

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Orphaned @api_router.get('/dm/{conversation_id}/messages') decorator at line 687 - function was defined at line 788 without decorator
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Removed orphaned decorator and added it properly before the function definition

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: DMCreate model had 'content: str' field that was not used by the /dm/create endpoint
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Removed the unused 'content' field from DMCreate model
